name: Parthraj Singh Bhati
summary: Aspiring Full-Stack Developer with multiple projects, 200+ LeetCode problems solved, over 600 DSA questions completed, Pupil on Codeforces (1246), 3-star on CodeChef (1665), and Hacktoberfest participant.

education.institution: Newton School of Technology, Rishihood University

projects.name: NextFlow
projects.description: A visual AI workflow builder where users drag, drop, and connect 6 node types into automated LLM pipelines with parallel DAG execution, reducing multi-step AI task setup from hours to under 5 minutes. Features: Parallel branch execution cutting workflow runtime by 40% via concurrent Trigger.dev tasks, multimodal Gemini integration supporting text + image inputs, real-time execution feedback with animated node states, full workflow persistence to PostgreSQL, and export/import as JSON — all behind Clerk-authenticated protected routes.

projects.name: QuickDB - No Code Database
projects.description: An API-first client-side database tool built for frontend developers who don't want to set up a backend or database. The platform automatically generates APIs that allow users to store, fetch, update, and delete data directly from frontend applications, enabling rapid prototyping and full-stack-like functionality using only frontend skills. Features: Instant CRUD operations, JSON viewer, search and filter support, fully responsive design, and real-time data visualisation. The platform has been used by 10+ developers during testing for quick and efficient local data management.
